default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Yourco and GrowthX to discuss marketing performance, SEO strategy, and website optimization opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/QZeFsgRgjoiQ3abTXqk3nLwBsS34DQFi?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Positive SEO momentum**: Ranking keywords nearly doubled since July 1st with upward traffic trend despite weekly fluctuations](https://fathom.video/share/QZeFsgRgjoiQ3abTXqk3nLwBsS34DQFi?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)
  - [**LLM visibility gaps**: Competitors appearing in LLM results for key terms while Yourco is underrepresented](https://fathom.video/share/QZeFsgRgjoiQ3abTXqk3nLwBsS34DQFi?tab=summary&timestamp=425.0)
  - [**Website conversion barriers**: Significant optimization opportunities in messaging, form design, and conversion paths hampered by resource constraints](https://fathom.video/share/QZeFsgRgjoiQ3abTXqk3nLwBsS34DQFi?tab=summary&timestamp=1943.0)
  - [**Engineering bottleneck**: Marketing initiatives consistently deprioritized (1-2 week turnaround for simple changes), creating major growth experimentation barriers](https://fathom.video/share/QZeFsgRgjoiQ3abTXqk3nLwBsS34DQFi?tab=summary&timestamp=2782.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance & Momentum

  - [Ranking keywords have almost 2x'd since July 1st - promising pattern similar to pre-growth indicators at Kyle's previous company](https://fathom.video/share/QZeFsgRgjoiQ3abTXqk3nLwBsS34DQFi?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)
  - [Traffic showing upward trend even during shortened week](https://fathom.video/share/QZeFsgRgjoiQ3abTXqk3nLwBsS34DQFi?tab=summary&timestamp=281.0)
  - [Consistently strong clusters: safety, compliance, translations (3+ months)](https://fathom.video/share/QZeFsgRgjoiQ3abTXqk3nLwBsS34DQFi?tab=summary&timestamp=1638.0)
  - [Recently emerging clusters: shift report, scheduling, SOP (operations-focused)](https://fathom.video/share/QZeFsgRgjoiQ3abTXqk3nLwBsS34DQFi?tab=summary&timestamp=1638.0)
  - [Weekly cluster fluctuations normal at current traffic volumes; long-term trends more meaningful for analysis](https://fathom.video/share/QZeFsgRgjoiQ3abTXqk3nLwBsS34DQFi?tab=summary&timestamp=1688.0)

### LLM Visibility Challenges

  - [LLM traffic represents small but growing percentage generating actual conversions](https://fathom.video/share/QZeFsgRgjoiQ3abTXqk3nLwBsS34DQFi?tab=summary&timestamp=497.0)
  - [Competitive testing shows smaller competitors appearing in results while Yourco often absent](https://fathom.video/share/QZeFsgRgjoiQ3abTXqk3nLwBsS34DQFi?tab=summary&timestamp=743.0)
  - [Jessica's tests across Perplexity, ChatGPT showed competitors (Beekeeper, UText, GoHappy) appearing for key terms](https://fathom.video/share/QZeFsgRgjoiQ3abTXqk3nLwBsS34DQFi?tab=summary&timestamp=743.0)
  - [Terminology gap identified: Yourco uses "non-desk workers" while industry and prospects prefer "frontline workers"](https://fathom.video/share/QZeFsgRgjoiQ3abTXqk3nLwBsS34DQFi?tab=summary&timestamp=1046.0)
  - [GrowthX recommends adapting content language to match terminology that resonates with both audience and LLMs](https://fathom.video/share/QZeFsgRgjoiQ3abTXqk3nLwBsS34DQFi?tab=summary&timestamp=1074.0)

### Website Conversion Optimization

  - [Current site has substantial improvement opportunities potentially yielding double-digit conversion lifts](https://fathom.video/share/QZeFsgRgjoiQ3abTXqk3nLwBsS34DQFi?tab=summary&timestamp=2007.0)
  - [Form length creating major friction (mandatory SMS fields) - could improve with multi-stage design](https://fathom.video/share/QZeFsgRgjoiQ3abTXqk3nLwBsS34DQFi?tab=summary&timestamp=2221.0)
  - ["Talk to Sales" CTA ineffective; needs benefit-focused reframing](https://fathom.video/share/QZeFsgRgjoiQ3abTXqk3nLwBsS34DQFi?tab=summary&timestamp=2705.0)
  - [Messaging lacks clarity - requires excessive mental bandwidth from visitors](https://fathom.video/share/QZeFsgRgjoiQ3abTXqk3nLwBsS34DQFi?tab=summary&timestamp=2670.0)
  - [Homepage structure buries critical information that should be prominent](https://fathom.video/share/QZeFsgRgjoiQ3abTXqk3nLwBsS34DQFi?tab=summary&timestamp=2631.0)
  - [Customer testimonials/success stories need strategic placement for conversion impact](https://fathom.video/share/QZeFsgRgjoiQ3abTXqk3nLwBsS34DQFi?tab=summary&timestamp=2127.0)

### Engineering Resources Bottleneck

  - [Website changes consistently deprioritized behind product development and support](https://fathom.video/share/QZeFsgRgjoiQ3abTXqk3nLwBsS34DQFi?tab=summary&timestamp=2792.0)
  - [Resource allocation hierarchy: 1) support tickets, 2) product development, 3) growth initiatives](https://fathom.video/share/QZeFsgRgjoiQ3abTXqk3nLwBsS34DQFi?tab=summary&timestamp=2865.0)
  - [Kyle emphasized this as "chronically under-resourced" despite being fundamental to growth](https://fathom.video/share/QZeFsgRgjoiQ3abTXqk3nLwBsS34DQFi?tab=summary&timestamp=2941.0)
  - [Content currently hosted in Google Drive instead of properly on Yourco site](https://fathom.video/share/QZeFsgRgjoiQ3abTXqk3nLwBsS34DQFi?tab=summary&timestamp=1434.0)
  - [Series A fundraising (9-12 month timeline) could help address resource constraints](https://fathom.video/share/QZeFsgRgjoiQ3abTXqk3nLwBsS34DQFi?tab=summary&timestamp=3081.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jessica sharing LLM test prompts to compare against GrowthX's current tracking](https://fathom.video/share/QZeFsgRgjoiQ3abTXqk3nLwBsS34DQFi?tab=summary&timestamp=1002.0)
  - [GrowthX analyzing which content clusters drive recent keyword growth](https://fathom.video/share/QZeFsgRgjoiQ3abTXqk3nLwBsS34DQFi?tab=summary&timestamp=1581.0)
  - [GrowthX examining terminology usage to better align with audience preferences](https://fathom.video/share/QZeFsgRgjoiQ3abTXqk3nLwBsS34DQFi?tab=summary&timestamp=1074.0)
  - [Yourco engineering to move PDF templates from Google Drive to website](https://fathom.video/share/QZeFsgRgjoiQ3abTXqk3nLwBsS34DQFi?tab=summary&timestamp=1434.0)
  - [Yourco to redesign PDF placement on blog posts for better prominence](https://fathom.video/share/QZeFsgRgjoiQ3abTXqk3nLwBsS34DQFi?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [Kyle offered WebStacks (website agency) introduction to explore external development resources](https://fathom.video/share/QZeFsgRgjoiQ3abTXqk3nLwBsS34DQFi?tab=summary&timestamp=3046.0)

action_items.description: Share LLM prompts used for competitor research in Slack channel
Analyze Jessica's LLM prompts, compare to Scrunch prompts, identify gaps/opportunities
Analyze cluster data by query, identify key trends driving recent growth
Investigate potential seasonality trends in Yourco's traffic/conversions
